source.name: Chapter 1.2: 8.1 Knowledge Check - Training with actions
source.instructions: **When you run 'python -m rasa train' in Level 2, what does Rasa do with your action files?**

answers.answer: It compiles them into the model file so the agent runs without the actions server
It ignores them; actions are loaded only when you start the action server
It checks that every action listed in the domain has a corresponding Python file in the actions/ folder; training fails if an action is missing or misnamed
It embeds the action code into the flow YAML files

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT describe how training validates actions
source.guidance: During training, Rasa validates that each action registered in the domain has a corresponding action class in the actions/ folder (the action's name() must match). If you register action_holiday_hours in the domain but the file or name() is wrong, training will fail with an error like 'Action X not found'. The model itself does not contain the action code; at runtime the action server loads the .py files when the agent runs.
